description: Integrated approved Phase3A polish slices onto prep/v0.1.1-alpha branch
All 122 tests pass on prep/v0.1.1-alpha after integration
Draft PR created from prep/v0.1.1-alpha to main for v0.1.1-alpha public alpha release. README cleaned up for public-facing alpha audience; branch cleanup report produced.
Final public-surface cleanup: README rewritten for professional public-alpha look, docs/README.md created as documentation index, branch cleanup report updated.

v0.1.2 stabilization: added --cwd to all Phase 2 commands (mission show/set, evidence add, decision add, opportunity score, drift scan, brief, doctor, mcp serve); unhid --cwd on review weekly; added 13 focused tests; 136 passing
v0.1.2 CI stabilization: added .github/workflows/ci.yml (ruff + pytest), fixed 25 lint errors across src/ and tests/, all 136 tests passing

README onboarding polish: added Installation section, rewrote Quickstart for external-repo --cwd flow, updated Using SPINE on any repo section, removed stale Known Limitations and What's Next items, fixed Python badge and test count.

Phase 3A planning normalization complete (Issue #10): corrected stale phase language in SPINE_OFFICIAL_SPEC_v0.1.md, strengthened SPINE_PHASE3A_v0.2_SPEC.md with portability+polish framing and discipline tax lens, aligned STATUS/ROADMAP/BACKLOG to v0.1.2-complete / Phase 3A-planned reality. No code changes.

Implement Issue #15 explicit repo targeting contract: fix resolve_roots() precedence (--cwd > SPINE_ROOT > cwd), validate SPINE_ROOT path existence, improve error messages, update --cwd help text in all 10 commands, add 11 new tests (147 total passing).

Issue #16: Implemented repo/branch context visibility. Added get_default_branch() and format_context_line() to utils/paths.py. Context header (repo/branch/default) added to mission show, drift scan, brief, review weekly, doctor. 18 new tests, 165 total passing.
Issue #18 implementation: bootstrap polish + discipline-tax ergonomics — 6 friction points fixed, 7 new tests added, 213/213 passing
Issue #23 artifact ergonomics: artifact_manifest.json, deterministic naming tests, 18 new tests (231 total passing)

Created docs/external-repo-onboarding.md: external repo quickstart, governance walkthrough, --cwd vs SPINE_ROOT targeting explanation, verification guide, and FAQ; updated docs index and status tracking

Issue #25 alpha-exit gate matrix validation complete. 20/21 gates pass. 1 non-blocking partial (no --json on append commands). Validation report written to docs/SPINE_ALPHA_EXIT_VALIDATION_REPORT.md. All Phase 3A items done. Alpha exit to v0.2.0-beta is justified.

Post-beta normalization: updated README.md (badge alpha→beta, capabilities heading, What's Next, Alpha Status→Beta Status), docs/ROADMAP.md (current status, active phase, alpha exit section, immediate next priorities), docs/SPINE_STATUS.md (current milestone, next priority, bottom note), docs/SPINE_FEATURE_BACKLOG.md (beta candidates intro, removed duplicate #24, Phase 3B→Beta labels), docs/SPINE_ROADMAP.md (full internal doc update to current state), docs/SPINE_PHASE3A_v0.2_SPEC.md (top status block updated to show release complete).

Implemented spine check before-pr (Issue #31): CheckService + check_cmd.py, 18 focused tests, all 249 tests pass. Docs updated: SPINE_STATUS.md, SPINE_FEATURE_BACKLOG.md, SPINE_BETA_IMPLEMENTATION_REPORT.md.

Implemented spine review handoff (Issue #32): HandoffService + review_cmd.py subcommand, 24 focused tests, all 273 tests passing. Docs updated: SPINE_STATUS.md, SPINE_FEATURE_BACKLOG.md, SPINE_BETA_IMPLEMENTATION_REPORT.md.
Beta Issue #33: implemented draftable governance records — --draft flag on evidence add / decision add, .spine/drafts/ storage, spine drafts confirm promotion, 24 focused tests, all 297 tests pass
Implemented Issue #34: spine hooks install/list/uninstall — local opt-in pre-push hook management wiring spine check before-pr into .git/hooks/. 50 tests added, 347/347 passing.

Beta bug hunt / regression audit on main branch. Inspected CLI surface (all 13 commands), artifact contracts, docs (README.md, ROADMAP.md, SPINE_STATUS.md, SPINE_FEATURE_BACKLOG.md, external-repo-onboarding.md, SPINE_OFFICIAL_SPEC_v0.1.md, SPINE_ROADMAP.md), services (check, drift, doctor, hooks, brief, review, init), and live command behavior. Found 18 findings spanning bugs, docs drift, workflow traps, and contract inconsistencies.

Beta blocker stabilization: fixed #43 (doctor warnings now advisory-only in check before-pr), #44 (hook script uses uv run spine), #45 (AGENTS.md template commands corrected). Files: check_service.py, hooks_service.py, init_service.py. Added 5 regression tests. 352/352 tests pass.

Issue #36: implemented spine mission refine + spine mission confirm + spine mission drafts. 26 new focused tests, 378 total tests pass. Draft stored at .spine/drafts/missions/<timestamp>.yaml, non-canonical header comment, explicit operator confirm required before canonical update.

Created docs/SPINE_INTEGRATIONS.md — public compatibility and integration guide for SPINE + Claude Code, oh-my-claudecode, and Superpowers. Updated README.md, docs/README.md, docs/external-repo-onboarding.md, SPINE_STATUS.md, and SPINE_FEATURE_BACKLOG.md. Issue #37 addressed.

Issue #38: implemented tests/fixtures/ + test_fixture_contracts.py — 58 new tests, 436 total passing. Covers mission.yaml Pydantic round-trip, artifact_manifest structure, JSON output shapes (doctor, check-before-pr, mission-show, review-handoff, brief, drift-scan), exit code contracts (7 scenarios), and --cwd targeting (5 scenarios).
Issue #49: Added --json to 7 write-oriented commands. 37 new focused contract tests pass. 473 total tests pass. No regressions.
Implemented spine check before-work (Issue #50): BeforeWorkResult + run_before_work() in CheckService, before-work CLI subcommand with --json/--cwd, 28 focused tests (all pass), 501 total tests pass.

Fix Issue #57: MCP tool-call crash — correct Server import path, async handlers, ReadResourceContents return type, stdio_server() transport, AnyUrl→str cast. Add 2 new end-to-end protocol-level MCP tests. All 503 tests pass.
